final_prompt.prompt:
Create an interior design illustration of a Nordic home living room scene (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a "极简主义" aesthetic — references in the spirit of Scandinavian design movement, MUJI interior philosophy, Alvar Aalto's organic modernism; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: framing is yours
Subject: must include a grey fabric sofa, green plants, floor lamp
Scene/backdrop: must include white walls, light wood flooring, large windows with sunlight streaming through
Lighting/mood: needs a clean, bright, warm and cozy atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: must be white dominant, light wood tones, grey accents
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
